hooks.command: if ! find lib/ -name '*.dart' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q .; then exit 0; fi; flutter analyze 2>&1 | tail -15

if ! find lib/ -name '*.dart' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q .; then exit 0; fi; if ! git diff --quiet HEAD -- lib/ integration_test/ pubspec.yaml 2>/dev/null || [ -n "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- lib/ integration_test/ 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo 'Invoque /jarvis-test-flow agora' >&2; exit 2; fi
